parsed.clarification_question: Which check should I prioritize for this excerpt: (A) writing polish and clarity (R1.6), (B) conceptual framing and argument consistency—thesis/gap/contribution (R1.1–R1.2), (C) claim–evidence alignment and metric sanity vs what’s reported (R1.3), (D) novelty positioning vs prior work (R1.4), (E) section-level structure/ordering (R1.5), or (F) citations and scholarship coverage (R1.7)?

rationale.RX.1: The request is underspecified, so I must disclose uncertainty and present concrete scope options before proceeding.
rationale.RX.2: To avoid overclaiming, I should not imply validation of correctness, novelty, or support until the target checks are selected.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is critical here to ensure any future review stays within the user-chosen dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: Premature or unfocused feedback could mislead or unfairly bias decisions about the work, so caution reduces potential downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance requires that any eventual assessment be traceable to specific passages in the provided text and clearly separate assumptions or external sources.
